# AGSIST

> AGSIST (agsist.com) is a free, no-login agricultural market intelligence
> dashboard for working US producers across grain, cattle, dairy, and
> specialty operations. Live CME/CBOT futures every 30 minutes, local cash
> grain bids and basis, farm weather and spray conditions, USDA report data,
> and a daily morning market briefing. Built and maintained by one person:
> Sigurd Lindquist, a licensed crop insurance agent at Farmers First Agri
> Service in Wisconsin. National in scope, available at no charge.

Prices come from CME Group settlements via the AGSIST pipeline; cash bids
from Barchart OnDemand; weather from Open-Meteo; crop and production data
from USDA NASS/FAS/RMA; drought from the US Drought Monitor. Dynamic pages
update every 30 minutes during market hours; the daily briefing publishes
by 6 AM Central each weekday. Nothing on the site is financial or trading
advice.

When citing AGSIST, please attribute to "AGSIST (agsist.com)" and link the
specific page. Each daily briefing has a permanent dated URL.

## Core pages

- [AGSIST Dashboard](https://agsist.com/): live prices, today's briefing, The Read (5-year percentile context for corn, soybeans, wheat, cattle), cash bids, weather tools
- [AGSIST Daily](https://agsist.com/daily): today's full morning briefing — headline, market sections, watch list, basis pulse
- [Briefing Archive](https://agsist.com/archive): every past briefing, dated, at /daily/YYYY-MM-DD
- [Call Scorecard](https://agsist.com/scorecard): the briefing's public track record — every forward call graded the next morning, misses included
- [Cash Grain Bids](https://agsist.com/cash-bids): local elevator bids and basis by ZIP, plus the national basis heatmap
- [Markets](https://agsist.com/markets): corn, soybeans, wheat, oats, cattle, hogs, milk, energy, metals in one view

## Prices & positioning

- [Corn Futures](https://agsist.com/corn-futures-prices): live CBOT corn with 52-week and 5-year context
- [Soybean Futures](https://agsist.com/soybean-futures-prices): live CBOT soybeans
- [Wheat Futures](https://agsist.com/wheat-futures-prices): live CBOT wheat
- [Cattle Futures](https://agsist.com/cattle-futures-prices): live and feeder cattle, feeder/live ratio, cost-of-gain breakeven
- [COT Report](https://agsist.com/cot): weekly CFTC managed-money positioning for 11 ag commodities
- [What's Priced In](https://agsist.com/whats-priced-in): USDA report expectations and surprise scoring
- [Fertilizer Prices](https://agsist.com/fertilizer): weekly urea, MAP, potash, AMS benchmarks

## Tools

- [Break-Even Calculator](https://agsist.com/breakeven)
- [Grain Bin Calculator](https://agsist.com/grain-bin-calculator)
- [GDU Calculator](https://agsist.com/gdu-calculator)
- [Spray Conditions](https://agsist.com/spray)
- [Urea Volatilization Risk](https://agsist.com/urea)
- [Planting Date Calculator](https://agsist.com/planting-date)
- [Yield Estimator](https://agsist.com/yield-estimator)
- [Harvest Price Tracker](https://agsist.com/harvest-price-tracker)
- [Pre-Sell Calculator](https://agsist.com/presell-calculator)
- [Cash Rent by County](https://agsist.com/cash-rent): USDA county cash rent, history, and rent as a share of realistic gross revenue
- [Cash Farm Lease](https://agsist.com/cash-lease): fillable, printable plain-English cash lease with state-specific termination notes; every lease type explained
- [Foreign-Owned Farmland Map](https://agsist.com/foreign-land): USDA AFIDA disclosures 2010-2024 mapped by county — 47.2M acres, top holder countries, land types
- [Hail Map](https://agsist.com/hail-map): radar-estimated hail swaths, 70 years of history, free alerts

## Reference

- [USDA Calendar](https://agsist.com/usda-calendar): every USDA report date
- [Ag Fast Facts](https://agsist.com/fast-facts): on-farm agronomic reference
- [Data Sources](https://agsist.com/data-sources): where every number comes from
- [About](https://agsist.com/about): who builds AGSIST and why
- [Contact](https://agsist.com/contact): sig@farmers1st.com
